# Copilot Repository Instructions

## Project baseline
- Frontend: React + TypeScript.
- UI stack: Tailwind CSS v4 + daisyUI.
- Product domain: pantry management, shopping list, and recipe suggestions.
- Authentication includes role-aware behavior.
- App-facing UI text must be in Spanish.

## Mandatory references before substantial changes
- `docs/README.md`
- `docs/frontend/react-architecture.md`
- `docs/frontend/state-management.md`
- `docs/conventions/coding-standards.md`
- `docs/agents/development-constraints.md`

## Coding expectations
- Keep changes scoped to the request.
- Respect folder and naming conventions.
- Maintain clear separation between server state and client/UI state.
- Prefer Tailwind utility classes and daisyUI components for UI implementation.
- Preserve or improve error handling and accessibility.

## Documentation expectations
- If behavior, architecture, or conventions change, update the corresponding docs in the same change.
